name: runesmith-workspace
description: [RuneSmith] Workspace structure manager. Single source of truth for the canonical layout (_INBOX drop zone, plans/active with per-plan tickets/refs, notes, drafts, research, source-docs, archive/superseded, archive/tickets-pushed). /reallocate migrates from any prior shape (auto-snapshots) and pins folder-conventions into CLAUDE.md so future sessions stay coherent. /inbox classifies dropped files and routes them to their canonical homes on consent.
